caption: A man is recorded in a studio setting, wearing a black t-shirt that reads "CHECK IT MAN" and a black baseball cap with an emblem. He wears over-ear headphones and sits behind a professional microphone. In the background, a white wall features a logo with the words "ERICROSS HUSTLE" and five gold stars. On-screen graphics include a logo on the left that says "STUDIO PODCAST" and text on the right that reads "BOSS TALK 101" with smaller text below stating "Hi 11 ago clip". The man begins by looking toward the left with a neutral expression, resting his hand near his chin. As the sequence progresses, he maintains this posture while shifting his gaze slightly and beginning to speak. In the final moments, he raises his right hand to make a gesturing motion with his finger while continuing to talk.
